title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Pantaloons Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Pantaloons Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pantaloons Ventures Solutions:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons Ventures Solutions!
